name: Alumni Affairs
summary: The central coordinating body for all cantonment-based alumni associations. Responsible for fostering unity, strengthening inter-institutional relationships, and ensuring effective engagement among alumni nationwide.

name: Membership Affairs
summary: Entrusted with the management of member enrollment, verification, and record-keeping. Ensures all memberships are granted in accordance with the established rules, regulations, and eligibility criteria of CAWAB.

name: University Affairs
summary: Oversees matters related to alumni currently enrolled in universities. Facilitates academic support, mentorship programs, and networking opportunities to ensure continued engagement with CAWAB.

name: Foreign Affairs
summary: Manages communication and coordination with alumni residing abroad. Aims to establish a strong international network and promote CAWAB's presence on a global platform.

name: Media & Publication Affairs
summary: Responsible for managing all forms of media communication, including press releases, official statements, digital platforms, and publications. Ensures the organization's image, messaging, and information dissemination is maintained professionally.

name: Culture & Sports
summary: Organizes cultural events, sports activities, and social functions. Its objective is to promote unity, cultural values, and healthy engagement among members.

name: Disaster Management & Relief Affairs
summary: Tasked with planning and executing emergency response initiatives during natural disasters and crises. Coordinates volunteer mobilization, relief distribution, and humanitarian assistance programs.

name: Cantonment Institutional Affairs
summary: Maintains liaison with cantonment-based educational institutions. Addresses issues related to current students and ensures continued collaboration between CAWAB and these institutions.

name: Law & Justice Affairs
summary: Handles all legal and compliance-related matters of the organization. Provides legal advisory support and ensures that CAWAB operates within the framework of applicable laws and regulations.

name: Land & Logistics Affairs
summary: Responsible for the management, maintenance, and utilization of CAWAB's physical assets. Oversees logistical arrangements for organizational activities and operations.

name: Military Affairs
summary: Coordinates with retired military personnel who are alumni members. Ensures their active participation, representation, and contribution to the organization.

name: Health & Family Welfare
summary: Promotes health awareness, organizes medical support initiatives, and implements welfare programs for members and their families.

name: Education
summary: Focuses on academic development through scholarships, training programs, seminars, and educational support initiatives for students and alumni.

name: Information & Technology Affairs
summary: Manages all digital infrastructure, databases, and technological systems of CAWAB. Supports innovation and ensures efficient digital operations.

name: Public Relations
summary: Responsible for maintaining relationships with government bodies, partner organizations, and external stakeholders. Works to enhance CAWAB's public image and institutional partnerships.

name: Branding & Fundraising
summary: Develops and maintains the organization's brand identity. Plans and executes fundraising strategies, sponsorship engagements, and financial resource mobilization.

name: Innovation & Entrepreneurship
summary: Promotes innovation, leadership, and entrepreneurial initiatives among members. Supports the development of startups, business ventures, and creative solutions.
